name: Tag Master Bot
description: Powerful Telegram tagging bot – 8 tag styles, flood protection, MongoDB, Heroku Standard 2X.

API_ID.description: Telegram API ID – get from https://my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Telegram API Hash – get from https://my.telegram.org

OWNER_ID.description: Your Telegram numeric user ID (get from @userinfobot)

MONGO_URI.description: MongoDB Atlas connection URI. Format: mongodb+srv://user:pass@cluster.mongodb.net – free cluster at cloud.mongodb.com

BOT_USERNAME.description: Your bot username WITHOUT the @ symbol (e.g. MyTagBot)

UPDATES_CHANNEL.description: Your Telegram updates channel link (e.g. https://t.me/mychannel)

BATCH_DELAY.description: Seconds between each 6-user batch for /all and /admin (default: 3.0)

FLOOD_SLEEP.description: Max seconds to sleep on Telegram FloodWait (default: 60)

USERS_PER_MSG.description: Number of @mentions per message for /all and /admin (default: 6)
